title: Our Partners
intro: ValorForge partners with best-in-class technology and teaming partners to deliver mission-ready solutions across the federal landscape.

partners.name: IQGeo
partners.body: AI-powered geospatial software for the full telecom and utility network lifecycle — planning, design, construction, and operations. Trusted by AT&T, Deutsche Telekom, and Brightspeed for national-scale deployments.

partners.name: Aavya
partners.body: Business intelligence, cloud modernization, managed services, and AI-driven solutions that accelerate enterprise growth. Headquartered in Fairfax, VA with global delivery from the U.S. and Japan.

partners.name: Blue Heron Defense
partners.body: SDVOSB delivering assessor-aligned CMMC 2.0 readiness, enclave engineering, zero-trust architecture, and evidence operations for federal contractors operating in high-consequence environments.
